basic_details.job_title: Attar Sain Jain Eye and General Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Attar Sain Jain Eye and General Hospital
basic_details.short_information: Attar Sain Jain Eye and General Hospital Senior Resident (Ophthalmology) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of the hospital. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Attar Sain Jain Eye and General Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree/Diploma alongwith MBBS Degree from recognized University/Institution, Enrolled with Delhi Medical Council
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree/Diploma alongwith MBBS Degree from recognized University/Institution & enrolled with Delhi Medical Council.

all_official_links.label: Download Attar Sain Jain Eye and General Hospital Senior Resident (Ophthalmology

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident (Ophthalmology) position at Attar Sain Jain Eye and General Hospital is scheduled for 19 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Senior Resident (Ophthalmology) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Senior Resident (Ophthalmology) position announced by Attar Sain Jain Eye and General Hospital in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Senior Resident (Ophthalmology) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree/Diploma along with an MBBS Degree from a recognized University/Institution and be enrolled with the Delhi Medical Council.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Resident (Ophthalmology) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Resident (Ophthalmology) post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident (Ophthalmology) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Resident (Ophthalmology) post will receive a salary in the Pay Matrix Level 11, ranging from ₹67,700 to ₹208,700 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Resident (Ophthalmology) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident (Ophthalmology) post will involve an Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Attar Sain Jain Eye and General Hospital located?
faq.answer: Attar Sain Jain Eye and General Hospital is located in Delhi, with the pincode 110035.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for this position?
faq.answer: This is a walk-in recruitment. Interested and eligible candidates need to attend the walk-in interview on the specified date with all required documents. No prior online application is needed.
